# Selva

> Gamified multi-agent business orchestration platform

## Stack

- Frontend: Next.js 14, Phaser 3, React, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, Pydantic
- Real-time: Colyseus (WebSocket game state sync)
- Execution: LangGraph (multi-agent workflows with interrupt support)
- Database: PostgreSQL 16, Redis 7
- Monorepo: pnpm workspaces (TypeScript) + UV workspaces (Python)

## Entry Points

- API server: apps/nexus-api/src/main.py
- Office UI: apps/office-ui/src/app/page.tsx
- Colyseus: apps/colyseus/src/index.ts
- Gateway: apps/gateway/src/index.ts
- Orchestrator: packages/orchestrator/src/orchestrator.py

## API Base

http://localhost:4300/api/v1

## Key Endpoints

- GET  /health -- liveness probe
- GET  /ready -- readiness probe (checks DB + Redis)
- CRUD /agents -- manage swarm agents
- CRUD /departments -- manage virtual office departments
- GET  /approvals -- list pending HITL approval requests
- POST /approvals/{id}/approve -- approve an agent action
- POST /approvals/{id}/deny -- deny an agent action
- POST /swarms/dispatch -- dispatch a task to the swarm
- GET  /swarms/tasks -- list active tasks
- WS   /approvals/ws -- real-time approval event stream

## Monorepo Layout

- apps/ -- deployable services (nexus-api, office-ui, colyseus, gateway, workers)
- packages/ -- shared libraries (shared-types, ui, config, orchestrator, permissions, inference)
- infra/ -- Docker and Kubernetes configs
- scripts/ -- setup and seed utilities

## See Also

- llms-full.txt -- comprehensive reference with types, WebSocket contracts, and env vars
- docs/ARCHITECTURE.md -- component diagram and data flow
- docs/HITL_FLOW.md -- human-in-the-loop approval mechanics
